items.title: Gyan: Ghana's success will depend on Semenyo at the World Cup

items.title: Eckert given Saints' owner's backing as head coach apologises for Spygate scandal
items.summary: Tonda Eckert has taken full responsibility "for everything that happened" in the Spygate scandal, apologising to players, staff and supporters - but he will remain as Southampton head coach after recieving back from chairman Dragon Solak.
